---
title: "May the Fourth at Parkrun"
description: "Volunteering at Parkrun on Star Wars day."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-05-04"
categories: [running, Parkrun, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/ih1nj5EsJWs)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Volunteering today at Parkrun: May the Force be with you!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_parkrun-running-starwars-activity-7192623379479236608-A1Z_).*
